quote_of_day.text:
>>30214
money is just value attached to labor, if the nation was surviving and producing enough to feed enough people that it doesn't collapse it won't change if all of the production was automated, people would just get the same food for no work.
quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather on the board today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of casteist abuse moved over the board this morning, bringing scattered reports of bullying against a naarthie student in a Tamil college.

The system intensified, with multiple posters weighing in on the topic.

A heat wave of incel rhetoric swept across the board in the afternoon, with one anon proclaiming the rise of an 'incel army' and calling for the overthrow of existing social norms.

This development was accompanied by a high-pressure ridge of misogyny, as another poster mocked 'Baniya Jeet' for losing his wife to another man.

A cold front of Islamophobia moved into the region late in the evening, with one poster blaming Muslims for India's lack of development and spewing vitriol against the community.

Meanwhile, a fog of speculation rolled in over 'GujjewRat' and its possible connection to Bengal, with one poster expressing confusion and concern.

articles.title: Naarthie student claims bullying in Tamil college, roommate abuse
articles.body:
Anon posted about being a North Indian student in a Tamil private college, claiming they are one of the few North Indian students and face bullying from South Indian students.

They also stated their muscular Tamil roommate makes them do chores. Another anon responded with a personal concern, expressing fear about possibly being gay and worries about family discovery, given their conservative background. Anon then received several responses, some unsympathetic.

One anon told them to post proof or leave, while another asked if a profile with a face was needed on some platform. The original poster also received some harsh replies.

One anon responded with an offensive remark, saying to get fucked in their room. Another simply told them to kill themselves. Some anons provided unsolicited advice or criticism.

One anon suggested they were projecting and should post explicit content or role-play. Another asked a question in a seemingly casual manner. The thread also included some brief interchanges.

Anon asked for help seriously, while another anon provided a one-word response. A few anons made brief comments or asked questions.

The original poster's concerns about their situation and identity received a mixed response from other anons, ranging from unsympathetic remarks to requests for more information.

articles.title: Incel Rhetoric Sparks Debate on Indiachan
articles.body:
Anon kicked off the discussion with a bold declaration: 'INCEL RISES! INCEL RISES!

INCEL ARMY WILL MARCH WE WILL CONQUER INCHCELS WILL END THE TYRANNY GLORY TO INCELALLAH.' This post set the tone for the conversation, which quickly devolved into incel ideology and anti-radical feminist sentiment.

Anon responded with a critique of allyship with certain groups, stating 'not ally with mujeet, just beat the simp gobar brains first, if not then you cant impregnate pajeetas, if not then mujeet will outbreed, so the preference now are retardjeets.' Another anon chimed in, expressing frustration with Indian men, saying 'I'm more and more convinced that every man just wants sex with a woman. like you can offer a man literally what he asks for and he will reject if you're not a little submissive housewife and open your legs.' The conversation took a darker turn with discussions of violence against radical feminists and perceived enemies.

Anon advocated for doxing and violence against certain individuals, saying 'I need to dox all the retard of twox and AIW specially mods.

All glory to incels but this one is a low Iq dehato, either kill your wife to cut guts of men hating misandrists.' Others echoed similar sentiments, with one anon stating 'All death to Radical Feminists.' Some participants framed their stance as a form of self-defense or retaliation against perceived oppression.

Anon argued that 'We need to learn from mullahs not ally with them.

Mullahs and feminsits are united against hindu men.' The conversation also touched on themes of nationalism and anti-colonialism, with one anon labeling radical feminists as 'Anti-national' and more dangerous than other perceived enemies.

The thread was marked by its incendiary language and calls for violence against various groups. While some posters expressed frustration with societal issues, the dominant tone was one of aggression and antagonism.

The discussion did not appear to move towards a constructive or respectful exchange of ideas.

articles.title: Anon Mocks 'Baniya Jeet' for Losing Wife to Another Man
articles.body:
Anon started a thread with a post claiming that a wealthy 'Baniya jeet' couldn't find his wife's Snapchat account where she posts videos with her boyfriend.

One anon commented that even lower-caste women can be promiscuous, citing a personal experience with a Scheduled Caste girl who was 'fucked by all the chadlites in school' but remained chaste until marriage.

Another anon joked that the 'Baniya jeet' was stupid for not hiring a private detective to track his wife. Anon discussed the 'Baniya jeet's' death, with one saying he was killed for being a 'simp'.

Another anon mocked the victim, saying he was 'low IQ' and deserved to die. Anon compared the 'Baniya jeet' unfavorably to another man, Chetan, who spent 10 crore on his wife and received only a pity hug in return.

The discussion also touched on the idea that money can't buy loyalty or intelligence. One anon quipped that the 'Baniya jeet' could have gotten a 'hotter girl' who would have been loyal.

Anon gloated over the 'Baniya jeet's' misfortune, with one saying it's 'darwinism at play' and another joking that his wife didn't even give him sex.

The thread is filled with misogynistic and casteist comments, with Anon using slurs and mocking the victim's naivety and wealth.

articles.title: Anon blames Muslims for India's lack of development
articles.body:
Anon posted that India will never become developed as long as Muslims are present, citing high crime rates and corruption. The poster claimed Muslims are "beyond redemption" and that India needs to "get rid of them" to achieve greatness.

Another anon replied with statistics on caste dominance in Indian Civil Services, seemingly countering the OP's claims.

A respondent called Muslims "subhuman evil roaches" and another described them as "filthy." One user joked about atheists, saying they would "genocide" them if needed.

articles.title: Anon Speculates on 'GujjewRat' and Bengal
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread asking what was going on with 'GujjewRat' and whether it was related to 'New Bengal'.

Anon claimed Gujratis, Bengalis, and Punjabis are among the worst races in India, with men being 'cucks' and women being 'whores'. Another anon stated Gujarat's wealth leads to degeneracy.

Anon also joked about starting a startup for paper marriages with no interaction. Anon insulted various groups, including Bimarus, and made derogatory comments about women from different regions.
